Container.Name: BlindPass SPS Server
Container.Overview: Secret Provisioning Service API for BlindPass. Requires Redis and a configured workload identity provider (via SPS_AGENT_AUTH_PROVIDERS_JSON).
Container.Requires: Requires Redis on the same custom Docker network. Do not expose Redis directly to the internet.

Config.Name: REDIS_URL
Config.Description: Redis URL reachable from the same custom Docker network

Config.Name: SPS_HOSTED_MODE
Config.Description: Enable hosted workspace and dashboard flows

Config.Name: SPS_UI_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Public browser UI URL used in generated secret links

Config.Name: SPS_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Comma-separated first-party browser origins allowed to call the SPS API

Config.Name: SPS_AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN
Config.Description: Hosted refresh-cookie domain, including the leading dot when shared across subdomains

Config.Name: SPS_TURNSTILE_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional Cloudflare Turnstile secret for hosted login and registration protection

Config.Name: SPS_TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Trust reverse-proxy forwarded headers when TLS terminates upstream

Config.Name: BILLING_PORTAL_RETURN_URL
Config.Description: Return URL after billing portal sessions

Config.Name: SPS_AGENT_AUTH_PROVIDERS_JSON
Config.Description: Required for production: JSON array of workload identity providers {name, issuer, audience, jwks_url or jwks_file, require_spiffe}

Config.Name: Gateway JWKS File (Host Path)
Config.Description: Optional host path for a local JWKS file if used by an auth provider in SPS_AGENT_AUTH_PROVIDERS_JSON

Config.Name: SPS_EXCHANGE_POLICY_JSON
Config.Description: Optional JSON array defining Agent-to-Agent exchange policies

Config.Name: SPS_SECRET_REGISTRY_JSON
Config.Description: Optional JSON array defining known secrets and their classifications
